driftFactor.title: Modifier of vehicle velocity to the left or right. Setting it at 0 will result in a vehicle that only moves in its steering direction. While a value of 1 will result in a slidey car
driftFactor.description: 0.99 is a good default value. Should stick between 0 and 1, unless you want some interesting bugs.

engineAudioVolume.title: Audio volume of the vehicle's engine sound
engineAudioVolume.description: Advised to keep this between 0 and 1
